case_title: RYAN RODRIGUEZ DOS REIS VS. CARLOS MATURANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: N/A SERVED FEB-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MATURANA, CARLOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $709.56 FILED BY DOS REIS, RYAN RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT MATURANA, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOS REIS, RYAN RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATURANA, CARLOS $355.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE EACH 50/50 LIABLE FOR THE INJURIES SUFFERED BY PLAINTIFF'S DOG ON SEPTEMBER 22, 2015 - TOTAL DAMAGE IS $710.00 DIVIDED BY TWO IS $355.00 EACH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
